# Cafe655

> The digital hub of Cafe655.

## About

Cafe655 is a personal website and digital hub. It hosts multiple sub-sites covering different topics and projects.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://cafe655.com): The main landing page and hub directory.
- [Hub](https://cafe655.com/hub): The central hub with updates and links.

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js and hosted on Vercel
- Content is server-rendered for accessibility
